name: Blue Chromis
desc: Small, schooling damselfish often found hovering above coral heads.

name: Clownfish
desc: Famous for their symbiotic relationship with sea anemones.

name: Yellow Tang
desc: Known for their vibrant colors and sharp spines near the tail.

name: Sea Anthias
desc: Brightly colored reef fish that form large, beautiful schools.

name: Garibaldi
desc: California state marine fish, highly territorial and bright orange.

name: Pacific Rockfish
desc: Long-lived fish that blend into the rocky crevices of the reef.

name: California Sheephead
desc: Changes sex from female to male during its lifecycle. Important for urchin control.

name: Senorita Wrasse
desc: Slender wrasse that acts as a cleaner fish for larger species.

name: Kelp Bass
desc: A popular game fish found primarily in kelp forests.
